_comment: QLoRA / LoRA hyperparameters for Kara-Kumru-v1.0-2B fine-tuning

lora._comment_r: r=16 gives good quality/memory balance on T4 (16GB). Increase to 32 on A100.
lora._comment_alpha: alpha=2*r is a common rule of thumb for stable training.

quantization._comment: NF4 (NormalFloat4) is the optimal quantization for normally distributed weights.

training._comment_batch: Effective batch size = 2 * 8 = 16. Fits in 16GB T4 VRAM.
training._comment_optim: paged_adamw_8bit reduces optimizer memory by ~40% vs full AdamW.
